body: Dr. Meera, heads up — DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15 (Dental Council of India circular 2026-11-04). Maximum dose per IOPA exposure drops from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv. E-speed film passes at the new limit; D-speed does not. Digital RVG sensors unaffected. Audit your X-ray setup before Dec 15; document E-speed or RVG in your SOPs. Deadline: 2026-12-15. Want me to send you a one-line SOP checklist?
rationale: regulation_change: sourced, deadline surfaced, no invented clauses.
